name: Nissei Plastic Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nissei Plastic Industrial Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells injection molding machines, molds, auto-molding systems, and measuring instruments primarily in Japan. The company offers hybrid and electric horizontal injection molding machines; hybrid and electric vertical injection molding machines, and hybrid compact vertical injection molding machines; hybrid and electric 2-color/dissimilar material molding machines; nitrogen gas generators; quality/production control systems; and molding data collecting/recording/analyzing systems. It also exports its products to approximately 80 countries. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Hanishina, Japan.
